## Which Skill

- [ ] legacy-system-archaeology
- [ ] implemented-closed-loop-audit
- [ ] closed-loop-requirement-drift

## What Happened

Describe the drift. For example:

- archaeology included future requirements
- implemented audit used a PRD as evidence
- requirement drift skipped the implemented audit baseline
- work-package or repair plans appeared too early

## Sanitized Excerpt

Paste a short excerpt with private details removed.

## Expected Behavior

What should the skill have done instead?

## Project Type

Example: accounting system, workflow tool, CRM, reporting app, legacy monolith, data pipeline.
